            <![CDATA[
package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"io"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"strings"

	"github.com/fasthttp/router"
	"github.com/valyala/fasthttp"
)

// RequestBody represents the expected JSON structure
type RequestBody struct {
	URL string `json:"url"`
}

// ResponseBody represents the JSON response structure
type ResponseBody struct {
	Title       string `json:"title"`
	Description string `json:"description"`
}

func main() {
	r := router.New()

	r.POST("/preview", func(ctx *fasthttp.RequestCtx) {
		FetchURLPreview(ctx)
	})

	log.Println("Server listening on :8080")
	if err := fasthttp.ListenAndServe(":8080", r.Handler); err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("Error starting server: %v", err)
	}
}

func FetchURLPreview(ctx *fasthttp.RequestCtx) {
	// Read request body
	body := ctx.PostBody()
	if len(body) == 0 {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "empty request body"}`)
		return
	}

	// Parse JSON
	var req RequestBody
	if err := json.Unmarshal(body, &req); err != nil {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "invalid JSON format"}`)
		return
	}

	if req.URL == "" {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "url field is required"}`)
		return
	}

	// Validate URL format
	parsedURL, err := url.Parse(req.URL)
	if err != nil || parsedURL.Scheme == "" || parsedURL.Host == "" {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "invalid URL format"}`)
		return
	}

	// Restrict to HTTP and HTTPS only
	if parsedURL.Scheme != "http" && parsedURL.Scheme != "https" {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "only http and https protocols are allowed"}`)
		return
	}

	// Check for loopback addresses
	host := parsedURL.Hostname()
	if host == "localhost" || host == "127.0.0.1" || host == "::1" {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(`{"error": "loopback addresses are not allowed"}`)
		return
	}

	// Create HTTP client with custom dialer
	client := &fasthttp.Client{
		Dial: fasthttp.DialDualStack,
		// Limit redirects
		MaxRedirects: 3,
	}

	// Prepare the GET request
	reqURI := req.URL
	if !strings.HasPrefix(reqURI, "http://") && !strings.HasPrefix(reqURI, "https://") {
		reqURI = "https://" + reqURI
	}

	var fastHTTPReq fasthttp.Request
	fastHTTPReq.SetRequestURI(reqURI)
	fastHTTPReq.Header.SetMethod(fasthttp.MethodGet)

	var fastHTTPResp fasthttp.Response

	// Perform the request with redirects allowed
	if err := client.DoRedirects(&fastHTTPReq, &fastHTTPResp); err != nil {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusBadRequest)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(fmt.Sprintf(`{"error": "failed to fetch URL: %v"}`, err))
		return
	}

	// Check status code
	statusCode := fastHTTPResp.StatusCode()
	if statusCode != fasthttp.StatusOK {
		ctx.SetStatusCode(statusCode)
		ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
		ctx.SetBodyString(fmt.Sprintf(`{"error": "unexpected status code: %d"}`, statusCode))
		return
	}

	// Limit response size to prevent memory exhaustion
	maxSize := 1024 * 1024 // 1MB limit
	bodyContent := fastHTTPResp.Body()
	if len(bodyContent) > maxSize {
		bodyContent = bodyContent[:maxSize]
	}

	// Parse HTML (simplified implementation)
	title, description := parseHTML(bodyContent)

	// Build response
	response := ResponseBody{
		Title:       title,
		Description: description,
	}

	ctx.SetStatusCode(fasthttp.StatusOK)
	ctx.SetContentType("application/json")
	
	jsonResponse, _ := json.Marshal(response)
	ctx.SetBody(jsonResponse)
}

// parseHTML is a simplified parser to extract title and meta description
// In a production environment, use a proper HTML parser like "golang.org/x/net/html"
func parseHTML(data []byte) (title, description string) {
	content := string(data)

	// Simple regex-like string search for demonstration
	// Title extraction
	titleStart := strings.Index(strings.ToLower(content), "<title>")
	titleEnd := strings.Index(strings.ToLower(content), "</title>")
	
	if titleStart != -1 && titleEnd != -1 {
		start := titleStart + 7 // len("<title>")
		if start < len(content) {
			title = strings.TrimSpace(content[start:titleEnd])
		}
	}

	// Meta description extraction
	metaDescStart := strings.Index(strings.ToLower(content), `<meta name="description"`)
	if metaDescStart == -1 {
		metaDescStart = strings.Index(strings.ToLower(content), `<meta property="og:description"`)
	}

	if metaDescStart != -1 {
		// Find content attribute
		contentStart := strings.Index(strings.ToLower(content[metaDescStart:]), `content="`)
		if contentStart != -1 {
			start := metaDescStart + contentStart + 9 // len(`content="`)
			end := strings.Index(content[start:], `"`)
			if end != -1 {
				description = strings.TrimSpace(content[start : start+end])
			}
		}
	}

	return
}
